hero.name: Eduardo Miguel
hero.description: Software Engineer focused on Backend development with experience building scalable architectures using Python and TypeScript. Specialized in integrating Artificial Intelligence into business processes via LLMs, LangChain, LangGraph, and RAG. Proficient in API design (FastAPI/Django/NestJS) and multi-platform application development (Flutter and Angular). Seeking to provide high-impact technical solutions as an AI Backend Engineer.
